name: Xendit
description: Xendit — Southeast Asia payment infrastructure covering Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, and Thailand with VA, QR, cards, and disbursements.

seo.title: Xendit — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Xendit: Xendit — Southeast Asia payment infrastructure covering Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, and Thailand with VA, QR, cards, and disbursements.

when_to_use: Virtual account and QR payments for Indonesian merchants
Disbursement API for bulk payouts in Philippines and Indonesia
Cards and e-wallet acceptance across Southeast Asia via Xendit

pros: Best SEA coverage: ID, PH, MY, TH
VA, QR, cards, and disbursements unified
review.verdict: The Stripe of Southeast Asia — if you're selling in Indonesia or the Philippines, Xendit is the obvious default.
review.best_for: Merchants and platforms operating across Southeast Asia needing unified local methods
review.not_for: Businesses outside SEA or needing enterprise SLAs with guaranteed support times
